overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character exploring an open world environment featuring the Eiffel Tower and rocky terrain. The character walks through a mix of paved rocky areas and grassland under a bright blue sky, approaching and circling the iconic landmark before continuing toward a distant modern tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky paved plaza with scattered boulders

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a rocky paved area toward an open grassland

entered.detail: large weathered boulders scattered across the paved ground
concrete or stone slab pavement covering the walking surface

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide rocky plaza with large boulders scattered across paved ground. The area is open with full sky visibility and sparse vegetation, creating an arid park-like atmosphere.

events.description: ground surface transitions from paved stone to tall grassy field

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass toward the Eiffel Tower visible in the distance

entered.detail: tall dry grass covering the ground surface
iron lattice tower landmark visible on the horizon
tall modern skyscraper visible in the far background

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a grassy field as the character continues walking. The Eiffel Tower becomes visible in the distance ahead, with large rock formations flanking the sides of the path.

events.description: character approaches the base of the Eiffel Tower, tower grows larger in frame
character walks underneath the Eiffel Tower arch and looks upward at the structure

agents.ego_description: approaching the Eiffel Tower, walking beneath its iron lattice structure and looking up at the tower

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the iconic Eiffel Tower, which dominates the view as it grows from a distant landmark to an overhead structure. The character passes underneath the iron archway, looking up at the lattice framework against the blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy area with small water stream

events.description: character turns away from the Eiffel Tower and walks toward the right
character passes by a small stream or pond with water visible

agents.ego_description: turning away from the Eiffel Tower and walking past a small water feature in the grassland

entered.detail: small stream or pond with reflective water surface

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the Eiffel Tower, which moves to the right side of the frame and eventually exits view. The character passes by a small water stream or pond surrounded by rocks and trees before continuing into the open field.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland corridor toward distant tower

agents.ego_description: walking through open grassland toward a distant modern tower on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through expansive open grassland, heading toward a distant modern tower visible on the horizon. Large rock formations line both sides of the path, and the Eiffel Tower is no longer in view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a stark, rocky plaza through the heart of a landmark structure and into an expansive open grassland. It begins with the character traversing a wide paved area scattered with large boulders under a clear blue sky. As the terrain shifts into a grassy field, the Eiffel Tower emerges in the distance, growing from a far-off landmark to a dominating overhead structure as the character passes directly beneath its iron lattice framework. The scene then pivots away from the tower, gliding past a small rocky stream and clusters of trees before the landmark disappears from view. Finally, the camera moves forward through wide plains flanked by rock formations, heading toward a modern tower visible on the distant horizon.
